headline: Strategic angle — Implement robust supplier audit program to restore ESG index eligibility and reduce cost of capital by up to 40 bps
what_matters: Adani Power faces a significant ESG score gap versus peers like JSW Energy, risking exclusion from ESG indices and passive funds due to GRI 408 and BRSR Principle 5 non-compliance.
Employer brand damage may lead to senior talent attrition and union escalation; B2B customers may exclude Adani Power from procurement due to ESG criteria.
BRSR Principle 5 and GRI 408 triggered; SEBI may impose penalties of ₹10-50 Cr per violation; mandatory disclosure deadlines and risk of trading restrictions.
action: Strategic opportunity: Implement robust supplier audit program to restore ESG index eligibility and reduce cost of capital by up to 40 bps
Competitive position: Adani Power at disadvantage vs JSW Energy, which has stronger ESG disclosures and lower labor risk exposure
